title: Morgan Stark
content:
{{CharHub|Morgan Stark|Morgan Stark}} {{Character |image = Morgan H. Stark.png |real name = Morgan H. Stark{{Ref|AE}} |alias = {{Alias |nicknames = Maguna{{Ref|AE}}}} |species = [[Human]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|USA}} |gender = Female |DOB = [[2019]]''[[Avengers: Endgame]]'' [https://disneystudiosawards.s3.amazonaws.com/avengers-endgame/Avengers_Endgame.pdf script] |movie = {{Infobox List|''[[Avengers: Endgame]]''
{{Collapse|''[[Spider-Man: No Way Home]]'' (photo & [[List of Deleted Scenes|deleted scene]])}}}} |book = {{Infobox List|{{Collapse|''[[Look Out for the Little Guy! (novel)|Look Out for the Little Guy!]]'' (mentioned)}}}} |actor = [[Lexi Rabe]]
[[Katherine Langford]] (teenager; [[List of Deleted Scenes|deleted scene]]) |status = Alive}} {{Quote|I love you 3000.|Morgan Stark to [[Tony Stark]]|Avengers: Endgame}} '''Morgan H. Stark''' is the daughter of [[Tony Stark]] and [[Pepper Potts]], who was born a year after half of the planet's population [[Snap|disappeared]]. ==Biography== ===Early Life=== ====Raised in the Stark Residence==== [[File:MorganStark-FirstScene.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Stark wearing her [[Pepper Potts|mother]]'s Rescue helmet]] {{Quote|I got something on my mind."
"Was it juice pops?"
"Sure it was. That's extortion.|[[Tony Stark]] and Morgan Stark|Avengers: Endgame}} Morgan Stark was born in [[2019]] to [[Tony Stark]] and [[Pepper Potts]], who named her Morgan after Pepper's [[Morgan|eccentric uncle]]. She grew up in the [[Stark Eco-Compound]], where the three of them had a happy life together. In [[2023]], Morgan was in the play-tent outside the house when her father came outside to call her to come get some lunch. Tony called out for her, but she didn't answer; when he called her full name with mention of lunch, she came out of the tent with an [[Iron Man Armor: Mark XLIX|Iron Man]] helmet, telling him to "define lunch or be disintegrated". Tony told her not to wear the helmet since it was an anniversary gift for her mother, before taking the helmet off and asking her if she was hungry for lunch. She then told her father that she found the helmet in the garage when he asked her where she had gotten it. [[File:Tony Stark with Morgan.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Stark sees the [[Avengers]] arrive at her [[Stark Eco-Compound|home]]]] Tony then began to carry her inside until suddenly, he was approached by [[Steve Rogers]], [[Natasha Romanoff]], and [[Scott Lang]]. Seeing that Tony wasn't interested in helping them, Potts sent Morgan to "save him". Morgan did so and told her father that her mother told her to come save him. The family then returned to their lunch. That night, after Tony had finished solving [[time travel]], Morgan was sitting on a staircase watching him when he let out a swear, which she did also. Tony noticed Morgan sitting on a staircase and told her that she can't swear around the house and should go to bed. She then asked him why he was up, to which he told her that he had something on his mind. She said she had something on her mind and wondered if she wanted juice pops, much to her father's agreement. [[File:4Hvrrnx.png|{{AltFloat}}|Stark is put to bed by her [[Tony Stark|father]]]] After they finished their juice pops, Tony told her to go to bed and sleep. She then asked him to tell her a story, to which he told her a quick story about going to bed. She then told him that was a horrible story before he kissed her goodnight. Tony then told her he loved her tons to which she then told him that she loved him three thousand, much to his loving surprise.{{Ref|AE}} ====Tony Stark's Funeral==== [[File:James Rhodes & Happy Hogan.png|{{AltFloat}}|Stark attending her [[Iron Man|father]]'s funeral]] {{Quote|But then again, that's the hero gig, right?. Part of the journey is the end. What am I even tripping for? Everything's gonna work out exactly the way it's supposed to. I love you 3000.|[[Tony Stark]] to Morgan Stark|Avengers: Endgame}} Days later, at her father's funeral, Morgan watched a holo-recording that her father had made in the event of his death, telling her that he loved her. Walking outside with her [[Pepper Potts|mother]], Stark witnessed the funeral procession for her father and cried in her mother's arms. [[File:Happy Hogan & Morgan Stark.png|{{AltFloat}}|Stark sitting down with [[Happy Hogan]]]] After the service concluded, Morgan sat with [[Happy Hogan]], where she asked for a cheeseburger, as she felt hungry. Hogan comforted her, telling Morgan that her father had liked cheeseburgers as well. Hogan promised he would get her as many cheeseburgers as she wanted.{{Ref|AE}} Sometime later, she drew herself and Hogan and gave the drawing to him in his [[Happy Hogan's Condominium|condominium]].{{Ref|SMNWH}} {{Clear}} ==Facilities== *'''[[Stark Eco-Compound]]''': Morgan lives in this residence alongside her [[Pepper Potts|mother]], with her bedroom being on the second floor. It is also where she and her mother held the funeral of her [[Iron Man|father]]. ==Relationships== ===Family=== *[[Howard Stark, Sr.]] † - Paternal Great-Grandfather *Paternal Great-Grandmother † *[[Howard Stark]] † - Paternal Grandfather *[[Maria Stark]] † - Paternal Grandmother *Maternal Grandmother *[[Morgan]] - Maternal Great-Uncle and Namesake *[[Iron Man|Tony Stark/Iron Man]] † - Father *[[Pepper Potts]] - Mother ===Allies=== *[[Gerald (Alpaca)|Gerald]] - Pet *[[Happy Hogan]] - Friend *[[Avengers]] **[[Steve Rogers|Steve Rogers/Captain America]] **[[Black Widow|Natasha Romanoff/Black Widow]] † **[[Ant-Man|Scott Lang/Ant-Man]] **[[War Machine|James Rhodes/War Machine]] **[[Hulk|Bruce Banner/Hulk]] **[[Thor]] **[[Hawkeye|Clint Barton/Hawkeye]] ==Trivia== *In the comics, Morgan Stark is the name of [[Tony Stark]]'s cousin, who resented him for his fortune. ==Behind the Scenes== [[File:Tony and Morgan - Soulworld.jpg|thumb|250px|right|An adult Morgan Stark in a [[List of Deleted Scenes|deleted scene]]]] *[[Katherine Langford]] portrayed an older version of Morgan Stark in a [[List of Deleted Scenes|deleted scene]] in ''[[Avengers: Endgame]]'' in which [[Tony Stark]] meets her in the [[Soulworld]]. The scene was shown in a test screening of the movie, which both confused and did not emotionally resonate with the audience, resulting in it being cut.[https://www.stitcher.com/podcast/panoply/happy-sad-confused/e/52987142?autoplay=true Anthony & Joe Russo, Vol. III (Avengers: Endgame Spoiler Special!)] *[[Lexi Rabe]] originally reprised her role as Morgan Stark in ''[[Spider-Man: No Way Home]],'' for which [[Sony Pictures Entertainment]] wanted to use her image, but the scene was [[List of Deleted Scenes|deleted]] from the final cut.[https://www.instagram.com/reel/CXrPHlHJl2V/ Lexi Rabe on Instagram - December 19, 2021] ==References== {{Gallery|Morgan Stark/Gallery}} {{Wq|Morgan Stark}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{WP}} [[es:Morgan Stark]] [[ru:Морган Старк]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Avengers: Endgame Characters]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Brown Hair]] [[Category:Brown Eyes]] [[Category:Genderbent for the Marvel Cinematic Universe]]
